codeReview.summary: The commit narrowly updates VAL-REG-002 so workspace-scoping assertions no longer depend on an implicit calendar reset after workspace switch. The added explicit calendar selection preserves the scoping proof in a known view state and matches the persisted TimerView contract.

summary: Reviewed the worker transcript skeleton, handoff, skill instructions, and commit 1269490. The test-only change correctly aligns VAL-REG-002 with persisted TimerView behavior without weakening the cross-workspace history assertions, and I found no blocking or non-blocking issues.
